arts.ttl: Is Van Nistelrooy the right manager to keep Leicester up?
arts.sum: Mark Chapman is joined by Shay Given, Chris Sutton and Rory Smith on the Monday Night Club to discuss Leicester City's appointment of Ruud van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: “Too much quality” | Alan Pardew backs West Ham to stay up
arts.sum: Former West Ham manager Alan Pardew was “hurting” after the 5-2 defeat to Arsenal on Saturday afternoon, however, he expects the Hammers to stay up this season. Speaking on talkSPORT on Sunday, the 63-year-old put the result and the Hammers season into question. He said: “It was hurting to hear that scoreline. And that stadium,... arts.sum: West Ham United have become the latest club to enter the battle for US Lecce’s Patrick Dorgu. That’s according to Gazzetta dello Sport, and they mention West Ham when covering the latest on Napoli’s plan to sign him. Antonio Conte’s side are keen on securing the 20-year-old’s services, after making him their priority target. arts.ttl: “Not convinced” | Pundit says Lopetegui on brink ahead of Leicester
arts.sum: West Ham and Julen Lopetegui are under enormous pressure ahead of our game against Leicester City later tonight. Our Hammers head to the King Power Stadium off the back of yet another poor performance and shocking result, this time at the hands of Arsenal, as doubts rise again over the long term future of Lopetegui.... arts.sum: West Ham United were supposed to be breaking new ground with their multiple summer signings and a continental manager in Julen Lopetegui, but the East Londoners have once again reverted to type with a new deal being readied for 32-year-old reserve, Vladimir Coufal. arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy 'hurt' by Man United exit
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy was disappointed to leave Manchester United after his spell as interim coach but said he understands Ruben Amorim's decision.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs West Ham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy begins his reign as Leicester City manager when the Foxes take on West Ham in the Premier League on Tuesday night. Both sides head into the contest looking for improvement, after disappointing starts to the season and heavy defeats at the weekend.
